description_long: This is a light blue slip-on flat shoe with a rounded toe and a low-cut, open side design. The upper appears to be made of a soft, matte fabric or synthetic material, while the sole is constructed from a textured, rope-like material, likely jute or a similar fiber, giving it an espadrille style. The interior is lined with a darker material, possibly fabric or synthetic leather, and the insole is slightly cushioned for comfort. A small fabric tag with branding is visible on the outer side near the heel. The shoe is lightweight and flexible, designed for casual urban wear. The overall construction suggests breathability and comfort for walking on city streets or sidewalks.
description: A light blue slip-on espadrille-style flat with a rope-textured sole and open sides, featuring a small fabric brand tag. The shoe is soft, lightweight, and designed for casual urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe and the open, low-cut sides of the light blue upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open side design, rope-textured sole, and visible brand tag near the heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel area and the open sides, with the rope sole wrapping around the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the uninterrupted light blue upper and the rope-textured sole.
